emails.subject: Re: Materials Ken Lay Used
emails.body: Re: Materials Ken Lay Used Thanks, Jeff. Not to be picky, but........ I think there is a typo in the document see Section 1, under "The Solution", bullet point 4 - "who's" should read "whose". I assume we would want to make this change before we use it again. Jennifer

emails.subject: Re: Materials Ken Lay Used
emails.body: Dear Ms Picky: Thank you and please don't hesitate to comment on such things in the future, because such comments are welcomed and encouraged. Signed, Grammatically challenged Jennifer Thome 05/29/2001 04:12 PM
